headline: MONTERA NAMES ASHLEY CODD (MICHALOVSKY) AS CFO
summary: Montera Infrastructure, which is scaling the next generation of digital infrastructure, has appointed Ashley Codd (Michalovsky) as its CFO. In this role, Codd will lead Montera's financial strategy, capital planning, and risk management, ensuring the company has the fiscal foundation to deliver strategically located, rapidly deployable hyperscale data center solutions.

headline: 3 High Yield Dividend Paying Stocks Perfect For Passive Income

headline: Gillette Teams Up with the NHL in Canada
summary: TORONTO, April 15, 2026--Gillette, the world's leading expert in men's grooming, and the National Hockey League (NHL) today announced a multi-year Canadian partnership, naming Gillette the Official Shave partner of the NHL. The partnership unites two brands each with a rich history in sports. Together, they are driven by precision and performance, sharing a dedication to technical mastery at the highest level.

headline: Slim Jim Maker Conagra Replacing CEO Following 60% Stock Slide
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Conagra Brands Inc. announced its chief executive, Sean Connolly, will step down at the end of next month and be replaced by consumer goods veteran John Brase, on June 1.Brase, 58, most recently served as the president and chief operating officer of JM Smucker Co., which he joined in 2020.
